# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-10-31'
      name: SPSubscriptionContributor
      type: Microsoft.Azure.Security.initiateServicePrincipal
      properties:
        servicePrincipalNames:
          - azure-devops-principal
        displayName: Azure DevOps Service Principal
      scope:
        subscriptionId: '<subscription-id>'

    - apiVersion: '2018-10-31'
      name: SPSubscriptionContributorRoleAssignment
      type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
      properties:
        roleDefinitionId: b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c
        principalId: $(servicePrincipalObjectId)
      dependencies: [ SPSubscriptionContributor ]
